title: StudioDash Private Beta
description: Learn about the StudioDash Private Beta, who it's designed for, and how you can help shape the future of the platform.
summary: StudioDash is preparing for a controlled private beta with independent developers and small studios who want to help shape the product.

sections.heading: Help Shape StudioDash
paragraphs: StudioDash is preparing for a controlled private beta, giving a small group of independent developers and studios early access before the public release.
The goal is simple: work alongside real developers, gather practical feedback, and ensure StudioDash solves the challenges developers face every day.

sections.heading: What You'll Be Exploring
paragraphs: Private beta participants will experience StudioDash as a native Mac and iPad workspace designed to bring together the information developers check most often.
bullets: Portfolio dashboards for apps, games, websites, and revenue.
App Store Connect downloads, ratings, reviews, and lifecycle information.
Cloudflare, advertising, search visibility, provider health, reporting, and synchronisation.
A single workspace designed to reduce dashboard switching.

sections.heading: Who Should Apply?
paragraphs: The StudioDash Private Beta is designed for developers who actively manage apps, games, websites, or online services and are happy to provide honest, constructive feedback.
bullets: Teams managing multiple products and services.

sections.heading: What We're Looking For
paragraphs: Your feedback will help shape the future of StudioDash by identifying opportunities to improve the product before its public release.
bullets: Which dashboards you use most often.
Where the interface could be clearer.
Suggestions for improving usability, performance, reporting, and synchronisation.

sections.heading: How Invitations Work
paragraphs: Places in the private beta are limited. Invitations will be issued in stages based on testing requirements, supported platforms, integration coverage, and the feedback we're looking for.
If you're selected, you'll receive your invitation directly from BarkinMad Studios before the wider public release.

sections.heading: Applying for the Private Beta
paragraphs: Applications aren't open just yet, but the information below gives an overview of what we'll ask for when registrations begin.
bullets: Number of published apps or games.
Why you'd like to join the beta.

sections.heading: Your Privacy
paragraphs: When beta registrations open, the information you provide will only be used to manage the StudioDash Private Beta programme, including reviewing applications, issuing invitations, and communicating with successful applicants.
Your details won't be shared publicly or used for unrelated marketing. For more information, please read the BarkinMad Studios Privacy Policy.
